'''Aiwha Squad''' was an elite [[Clone commando/Legends|clone commando]] unit, and was part of the [[Grand Army of the Republic/Legends|Grand Army of the Republic]] during the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]]. This unit was named after the native [[Aiwha/Legends|Aiwhas]] of [[Kamino/Legends|Kamino]].

==History==
During a skirmish with the [[Separatist Droid Army/Legends|Separatist Droid Army]], the Republic accidentally bombed a farmhouse on [[Garqi/Legends|Garqi]]. Aiwha Squad was ordered to search for women and children and to bring them back to a refugee camp. While searching a building, [[Zag]] found a little boy named [[Evan]].

Evan was forcibly escorted by the Aiwhas. When he tried and run away, the little boy was attacked by a [[OG-9 homing spider droid/Legends|homing spider droid]], but [[Sarge (clone commando)|Sarge]], the leader of the squad, threw a rock at the droid, and the rest of the commandos ambushed it. Going to the refugee camp, the commandos dropped Evan off, and conversed with [[Jedi General/Legends|Jedi General]] [[Traavis]].

[[File:Aiwha_66.jpg|thumb|left|200px|Aiwha Squad executing [[Order 66/Legends|Order 66]].]]
At that moment, [[Order 66/Legends|Order 66]] was issued, and the commandos were forced to kill the Jedi [[General/Legends|General]] in front of the little boy. Sarge then explained that it was an order, and that clones don't question orders.
